{{CargoClone
|name=Blazing Dominator Mu
|rank=red
|cabin=1
|id=1003
|gene1={race} HARD +50
|gene2={race} AFFCT +50
|gene3=Resolver: W-tads extracted +15
|gene4=Per 60 Minions in battle:
> Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Lifesteal Rate +0.9%
|gene6=Per 60 Minions in battle:
> Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Lifesteal Rate +1.5%
|}}
